message.content:
@startuml
participant "JsonData" as JD
participant "Permission1" as P1
participant "Callback" as CB
participant "JsonData2" as JD2
participant "Permission2" as P2

JD -> P1 : hasAccess
P1 -> CB : execute
CB -> JD2 : execute
JD2 -> P2 : hasAccess
P2 --> JD2 : false
CB <-- JD2 : Session expired
P1 <-- CB : Throw exception
JD <-- P1 : false
@enduml
